positive: A circular, central motif inspired by Neo-Art Nouveau and celestial botanical themes. The design features highly stylized elements: interwoven mandalas composed of intricate, swirling nebulae lines, delicate fern fronds, and abstract crystalline forms. The composition must utilize strong, graphic black linework against a muted, deep indigo background. Focus on high contrast and clean silhouettes, giving it a vector-like, engraved aesthetic perfect for apparel printing. Central placement, symmetrical, detailed linework, ethereal, cosmic gardens.
negative: artifacts, grainy, blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, photographic, realistic, messy, smudged
